mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INQUIRY ( NO, MEMBER_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, PHONE, CATEGORY ) VALUES ( INQUIRY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{phone}, #{category} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM INQUIRY WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND IS_DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY NO DESC
SELECT * FROM INQUIRY WHERE NO = #{no} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
SELECT * FROM INQUIRY WHERE IS_DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INQUIRY_ANSWER ( NO, INQUIRY_NO, ADMIN_NO, CONTENT ) VALUES ( INQUIRY_ANSWER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{inquiryNo}, #{adminNo}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM INQUIRY_ANSWER WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND IS_DELETED = 'N'
